prestazioni: Engine swap to a **K14C BoosterJet** (1.4L turbo, 140 PS stock) with a **Garrett GT2052S** turbocharger, ported and polished cylinder head by **Toda Racing**, and a **HKS Hi-Power Exhaust** with 60mm piping and a **SARD 60mm downpipe** for reduced backpressure. ECU reflash via **Ecutek RaceROM** with custom maps for 98 RON fuel and a **GReddy Profec B Spec II** boost controller targeting 1.2 bar (17.4 psi) peak boost.

Full **Tein Flex Z coilovers** (Suzuki Solio Bandit-specific valving) with **Whiteline 22mm rear sway bar** and **Cusco front strut bar** for chassis rigidity. **Project Mu B-Spec brake pads** paired with **DBA 5000 Series rotors** (280mm front, 240mm rear) and **Goodridge braided stainless steel brake lines** for pedal feel improvement.

Lightweight **SSR Type C** 15x6.5 ET38 wheels (4x100 PCD) wrapped in **Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R** 195/50R15 tires. **Spoon Sports** carbon fiber driveshaft and **Nismo LSD** (2-way mechanical) for improved power delivery. **AEM X-Series** wideband AFR gauge and **Defi Advance BF** oil pressure/temperature gauges for real-time monitoring.
estetica: **Varis Japan** front lip spoiler (Solio Bandit-specific, carbon fiber) with **Seibon Carbon** hood (weight reduction: ~4kg). **Rocket Bunny** rear overfenders (modified to fit Bandit’s rear quarter panels) and **C-West** rear diffuser with integrated **GReddy RS** dual exhaust tips (50mm).

**Bride Zeta III** bucket seats (Solio Bandit-specific mounting brackets) upholstered in **Recaro SP-G** fabric with **Takata Drift III** 4-point harnesses. **Sparco Pro 2000** steering wheel (350mm, suede) with **NRG quick-release hub** and **Momo shift knob** (short throw).

**Work Wheels** custom two-tone paint (Gunmetal/Neon Yellow) with **3M Matte Black Vinyl** roof wrap. **Osram Night Breaker Laser** HID headlights (6000K) and **Depo Racing** JDM-style taillights (LED, sequential turn signals). **Aerocatch** hood pins and **JDM-spec** rear wiper delete.
